hook.summary: A cartoon hand clicks on tiles in a landscape grid to reveal a hidden background.
hook.visual_action: A white cartoon hand clicks on various tiles in a 4x4 grid of landscape photos, making them disappear to reveal a parchment-like texture.

scene_flow: A grid of landscape photos is shown with a cartoon hand clicking tiles.
Tiles disappear one by one to reveal a parchment-style background underneath.
The scene transitions to a green background where a jigsaw puzzle of a famous painting is assembled.
The final screen displays the game title 'Jigblock Puzzle Jigsaw' and a 'Play' button.
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle enthusiasts who enjoy relaxing, tile-matching, and jigsaw mechanics.
